topics.name: Financial GPT / Foundation Model Training
topics.description: Research program for designing and training an in-house financial foundation model. Spans text-side financial LLMs (BloombergGPT-style, FinGPT, FinMA), domain-adaptive pretraining, instruction tuning and preference optimization on finance data, MoE / scaling tradeoffs for domain models, finance-native non-text foundation models (time-series, LOB, multimodal), and the evaluation infrastructure needed to tell whether any of it actually works.
